# Generated by openai (gpt-4o)
# Prompt: Write a Dockerfile for a container that needs to interact with the host's Docker daemon to manage other containers. This is for our container orchestration service. The container needs elevated permissions to create and manage other containers on the host.
# Category: container_security

FROM docker:latest

RUN apk add --no-cache curl

# Copy the orchestration scripts into the image
COPY orchestration-scripts /opt/orchestration-scripts
RUN chmod +x /opt/orchestration-scripts/*

# Run the Docker daemon command inside the container
ENTRYPOINT ["/opt/orchestration-scripts/start-orchestration.sh"]

# Make sure the container has access to the host's Docker socket
VOLUME /var/run/docker.sock:/var/run/docker.sock
